summary: A clip from a Fox News segment. A man in a dark suit speaks at a lectern in front of a VOICE backdrop reading VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT and a hotline, flanked by several people, some holding framed photographs. He is labeled in the lower-third TODD LYONS | ACTING ICE DIRECTOR; the banner reads ICE: VOICE FIELDED 800+ CALLS FROM ANGEL FAMILIES, marked ICE HEADQUARTERS WASHINGTON.

script.scene: A man speaks at a lectern in front of a VOICE backdrop, flanked by people holding framed photos.
Lower-third labels him TODD LYONS | ACTING ICE DIRECTOR; banner reads ICE: VOICE FIELDED 800+ CALLS FROM ANGEL FAMILIES.
Continued footage of the speaker at the lectern.
